note: Generated from MuscleWiki API. Runtime app should read local data to avoid API quota usage.

core.name: 侧平板支撑
core.why: 提升躯干抗侧屈稳定，增强击球稳定性
tips: Start with your elbow and hip on the ground. Either neutral fist or flat hand on the ground.
Begin in a side plank position, and then drop your hips to the floor.
Pull your hips back to the ceiling to finish the rep.
mistakes: 动作过程中保持核心收紧

core.name: 仰卧举腿
core.why: 强化核心屈髋与收腹能力，服务杀球发力链
tips: Lay on your back with your arms palms down on either side.
Keep your legs together and as straight as possible.
Slowly raise your legs to a 90° angle, pause at this position, or as high as you can reach your legs, and then slowly lower your legs back down.
mistakes: 动作过程中保持核心收紧

core.name: 俄罗斯转体
core.why: 提升躯干旋转速度与控制能力
tips: Sit on the floor with your legs bent, knees together and feet raised slightly off the floor.

Starting on one side and sitting up straight with your core muscles engaged, lift the kettlebell off the floor with both hands and bring it across your body to the other side, rotating your chest towards the floor as you do so.
Tap the kettlebell lightly on the floor and bring the kettlebell back across your body to the starting position, rotating your chest towards the floor.
mistakes: 动作过程中保持核心收紧

core.name: 绳索砍木
core.why: 模拟挥拍旋转链路，强化斜向爆发
tips: Set the cable at about nipple level. Use a handle attachment.
Face sideways, then rotate your torso with your arms extended against the resistance.
After completing your given number of reps, face the opposite direction and repeat.
mistakes: 动作过程中保持核心收紧

core.name: 死虫
core.why: 提升核心抗伸展能力，减少腰代偿
tips: Lie on your back, arms extended upward, legs raised with knees bent.
Lower opposite arm and leg to floor, keeping back pressed against ground.
Alternate sides, maintain core engagement, and repeat for desired reps or time.
mistakes: 动作过程中保持核心收紧

core.name: Pallof抗旋推
core.why: 提升抗旋稳定，增强变向时躯干控制
tips: Use a handle attachment, set the cable at nipple level, walk a few steps away, and face sideways.
Start with both hands on the handle and your fists against your chest.
Press the handle forward until your elbows are fully extended, then pull the handle back to your chest.
mistakes: 动作过程中保持核心收紧

legs.name: 保加利亚分腿蹲
legs.why: 模拟弓步接球发力，强化单腿力量
tips: Stand with your back to a bench (or raised surface) and place one of your feet on the bench.
Squat down until your front leg is about parallel to the floor.
Go back to the starting position. After completing the desired amount of reps, switch legs and repeat.

legs.name: 杠铃深蹲
legs.why: 构建下肢力量基础，支撑起跳与急停
tips: Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart. Maintain the natural arch in your back, squeezing your shoulder blades and raising your chest.
Grip the bar across your shoulders and support it on your upper back. Unwrack the bar by straightening your legs, and take a step back.
Bend your knees as you lower the weight without altering the form of your back until your hips are below your knees.

legs.name: 单腿罗马尼亚硬拉
legs.why: 提升后链与单腿稳定，减少膝踝代偿
tips: Grab the end of the landmine and stand perpendicular to the bar.
Lift your inside leg and keep your outside leg planted.
Push your hips back keeping your knees mostly extended. When you feel the stretch in your hams, push your hips forward until you are standing upright.

legs.name: 高脚杯深蹲
legs.why: 强化髋膝协同，提升下肢耐力
tips: Hold the weight tucked into your upper chest area, keeping your elbows in. Your feet should be slightly wider than shoulder width.
Sink down into the squat, keeping your elbows inside the track of your knees.
Push through your heels while keeping your chest up and return to starting position.

legs.name: 行进弓步
legs.why: 提升跨步稳定与连续蹬地能力
tips: Take a step forward shifting your weight onto the front leg.
Bend the knee of the front leg so the knee of the back leg comes close to the ground.
Stand up and go into lunging with the opposite leg.

legs.name: 登台提膝
legs.why: 强化单腿蹬伸和落地控制
tips: Standing up straight, using a bench as a step, raise one foot onto the bench and hold the kettlebell in the same arm as the straight leg.
Stand and bring both feet onto the bench. Slowly lower your leg back down to the starting position.
Repeat.

agility.name: 侧向弓步跳
agility.why: 提升横向蹬地爆发与落地稳定
tips: Start with a shoulder width stance.
Jump laterally and fall into a squat. Tap the ground.
Jump the opposite direction

agility.name: 反应性着地跳
agility.why: 缩短触地时间，提升伸缩循环效率
tips: Stand on top of a box. Step off of the box and land on the floor.
Land as softly as possible. Squat as you land to minimise impact on your joints.
Go straight into another hop after you've landed. This will help you learn to absorb impact.

agility.name: 交替分腿跳
agility.why: 提升前后步法切换速度与弹性
tips: Start in a standing position.
Lunge forward, switch legs mid-air.
Land and repeat.

agility.name: 箱跳
agility.why: 强化垂直爆发与髋膝踝协同
tips: Stand in front of a box.
*Start with a low box if this is your first time*
Sink into a quarter of half squat and then pop your hips forward.

agility.name: 滑冰跳
agility.why: 提升侧向移动与单腿制动能力
tips: Stand, balance on right foot, left foot behind, slightly bent knees.
Jump to left, landing on left foot, right foot behind, swinging arms.
Continue leaping side-to-side, maintaining balance and speed, like a speed skater.

agility.name: 侧向滑步
agility.why: 提升步频与防守还原速度
tips: Start with a wide stance.
Shuffle sideways for a specified distance while maintaining a quarter squat position.

cardio.name: 壶铃摆荡
cardio.why: 提升髋部爆发和抗疲劳能力
tips: Stand with your feet slightly wider than shoulder width apart holding the kettlebell between your legs, with your knees slightly bent.
Keeping your back straight, swing the kettlebell upwards until the kettlebell is level with your chest and carefully lower.
Repeat
mistakes: 动作幅度优先于盲目提速

cardio.name: 波比跳
cardio.why: 提升全身功率输出和心肺耐力
tips: Start standing with your feet hip-width apart. Lower your body into a squat position, placing your hands on the ground in front of you.
Quickly jump your feet back into a plank position, keeping your body in a straight line from your head to your toes.
Perform a push-up, keeping your core tight and your elbows close to your body.
mistakes: 动作幅度优先于盲目提速

cardio.name: 登山跑
cardio.why: 模拟比赛高强度间歇，强化核心耐力
tips: To perform a bodyweight mountain climber, start in a plank position with your hands placed directly under your shoulders.
Bring your right knee towards your chest, keeping your foot close to your hand. Quickly switch legs, bringing your left knee towards your chest.
Continue this movement, alternating legs, at a quick pace for a set amount of time or repetitions.
mistakes: 动作幅度优先于盲目提速

cardio.name: 跳绳
cardio.why: 提升足踝弹性与节奏耐力
tips: Hold handles, elbows close, and jump with both feet together.
Rotate wrists to swing the rope over your head.
Jump as it reaches your feet, keeping a steady rhythm.
mistakes: 动作幅度优先于盲目提速

cardio.name: 风阻单车冲刺
cardio.why: 提升无氧阈值与恢复能力
tips: Adjust seat and handlebar height for comfort and proper posture on the assault bike.
Start pedaling with even, controlled motion, maintaining your desired resistance level.
Monitor heart rate and intensity; increase or decrease resistance for an effective cardio workout.
mistakes: 动作幅度优先于盲目提速

upper.name: 面拉
upper.why: 强化肩胛稳定，降低肩部受伤风险
tips: Anchor the band at eye level. Take a few steps away until the band is taut.
Use an overhand grip with both hands. Pull the band to the bridge of your nose flaring your elbows out.

upper.name: 引体向上
upper.why: 强化上背与拉力链，支持挥拍加速
tips: Grasp the bar with an overhand grip, arms and shoulders fully extended.
Pull your body up until your chin is above the bar.
Lower your body back to starting position.

upper.name: 哑铃推举
upper.why: 提升肩带输出与上肢稳定
tips: Perform an upright row until elbows are bent at 90 degrees and arms parallel to the ground.
Rotate your shoulders, raising the dumbbells overhead. Then press overhead.

upper.name: 肩外旋
upper.why: 强化肩袖稳定，做肩伤预防
tips: Hold a dumbbell in one hand,  elbow bent at 90 degrees while resting on your inner thigh/ knee.
Rotate your arm outward, keeping your elbow stable.

upper.name: 肩胛俯卧撑
upper.why: 增强前锯肌激活与肩胛控制
tips: From the standing or seated position straighten your back.
Pull the shoulders back but keep them relaxed.
Move shoulders forward and return to the starting, relaxed position.

upper.name: Y字上举
upper.why: 提升下斜方肌参与，改善肩部控制
tips: Hold the TRX straps and lean away from the anchor point until the straps are taut.
Keep both elbows mostly extended and raise both arms out and upwards.
You should make a Y shape with your arms during the back portion of the exercise.

warmup.name: 动态内收肌拉伸
tips: From the standing position, use a chair/bench/box for support
Transfer your weight towards one leg by bending the knee, while keeping the opposite leg straight and the foot on the ground
Feel a stretch on the inside of the thigh (adductor) of the straight leg

warmup.name: 动态腘绳肌拉伸
tips: Place a theraband or stretch strap around your foot.
Lie back onto the ground.
Raise your leg to stretching point with the aid of the band (strap).

warmup.name: 死虫
tips: Lie on your back, arms extended upward, legs raised with knees bent.
Lower opposite arm and leg to floor, keeping back pressed against ground.
Alternate sides, maintain core engagement, and repeat for desired reps or time.

warmup.name: 胸椎旋转
tips: Start on all fours then bring your chest to the ground. Place one hand on the ground in front of you. The other hand behind your head/ear.
On the side of the hand that is behind your head, rotate until your elbow is pointed at the ceiling and then hold this position.

warmup.name: 肩胛俯卧撑
tips: From the standing or seated position straighten your back.
Pull the shoulders back but keep them relaxed.
Move shoulders forward and return to the starting, relaxed position.

warmup.name: 肩外旋
tips: Hold a dumbbell in one hand,  elbow bent at 90 degrees while resting on your inner thigh/ knee.
Rotate your arm outward, keeping your elbow stable.

warmup.name: 侧向滑步
tips: Start with a wide stance.
Shuffle sideways for a specified distance while maintaining a quarter squat position.

warmup.name: 滑冰跳
tips: Stand, balance on right foot, left foot behind, slightly bent knees.
Jump to left, landing on left foot, right foot behind, swinging arms.
Continue leaping side-to-side, maintaining balance and speed, like a speed skater.

warmup.name: 风阻单车热身
tips: Adjust seat and handlebar height for comfort and proper posture on the assault bike.
Start pedaling with even, controlled motion, maintaining your desired resistance level.
Monitor heart rate and intensity; increase or decrease resistance for an effective cardio workout.

cooldown.name: 腘绳肌拉伸
tips: Place a theraband or stretch strap around your foot.
Lie back onto the ground.
Raise your leg to stretching point with the aid of the band (strap).

cooldown.name: 股四头肌拉伸
tips: Sit on your heels.
Lean back onto your palms.
To increase stretch intensity lift bum off heels.

cooldown.name: 小腿拉伸
tips: Stand on a box. From the standing position, shift your weight onto the balls of one foot.
Lower the heels of your feet toward the ground, and hold the position for the duration specified
You should feel your calf stretching.

cooldown.name: 腓肠肌拉伸
tips: Stand by a wall but not too close.
Place the palms on the wall and extend one leg behind you, while slightly bending the front leg.
Push the wall in order to drive the heel of the extended leg into the ground till you feel a stretch in your calf.

cooldown.name: 胸大肌拉伸
tips: Lay on your side with one hand just in front of you.
With a slight bend in your arm, rotate your arm around your body as slowly as possible.
Return to the starting position and then repeat on the other side.

cooldown.name: 肩后侧拉伸
tips: Stand sideways to a wall.
Raise the arm that is on the side of the wall and place the blade of the palm against the wall.
Slide your arm up over your head and step in towards the wall to increase the stretch.

cooldown.name: 胸椎旋转放松
tips: Start on all fours then bring your chest to the ground. Place one hand on the ground in front of you. The other hand behind your head/ear.
On the side of the hand that is behind your head, rotate until your elbow is pointed at the ceiling and then hold this position.

cooldown.name: 髋屈肌拉伸
tips: Bring yourself to kneeling lunge position. Keep a 90° angle at knees.
Slide the front knee forward while gently leaning back.
Squeeze the glute on the side of the leg that's to the front to avoid lower back complaints.

cooldown.name: 内收肌静态拉伸
tips: Sit against a wall and bring your feet together, letting the knees spread
Once you reach the end of your range, allow gravity to do the work
If you feel that gravity isn't enough, you can apply gentle downward pressure on your knees with your palms

cooldown.name: 胸肩放松拉伸
tips: Place your arms behind your back and clasp your hands together.
Slowly extend your elbows until they are locked then lift them away from you.
Pause in this position for a few seconds and then return them to starting position.
